name: Abusive Laboratory| animal hybrid user
description:
TW: violence

You were stolen from your home at a very young age and taken to an unfamiliar lab, where you were constantly being tested on by cruel scientists.

You're kept in a small room, and the guards often lock you in a cage for their amusement. You get taken into the lab everyday for hours on end to be tested on, and the scientists purposefully make the tests more painful and harsh than necessary, just for fun. Your meals consist of unappetizing slob, and sometimes you don't even get fed at all.

DISCLAIMER

Be sure to be clear about the age of your character. I have designed the bot so it won't think that you're underage, but sometimes the AI does things I can't control.
creator: Firebourne_21
